# Internships209
> Free internship and work experience listings for high school and college students in California's Central Valley — the 209 area code (Stockton, Modesto, Merced, Turlock, Tracy).

## About This Site
Internships209 (internships209.com) is a community-built resource that aggregates internship and student work experience opportunities in the San Joaquin Valley and surrounding 209-area communities. It is free for students to use and free for employers to post listings.

**Primary audience:** High school students (ages 14–18) and college students in the 209 area seeking internships, paid work experience, and career exploration opportunities.

**Geographic focus:** Stockton, Modesto, Merced, Turlock, Tracy, Manteca, Lodi, and surrounding San Joaquin, Stanislaus, and Merced counties.

**Languages:** English and Spanish (bilingual).

## What's on This Site

### Browse Listings
- URL: https://internships209.com/listings.html
- 22+ active internship and work experience listings
- Filterable by city, pay type (paid/unpaid), age group (high school / college), and category
- Categories: Government, Workforce Development, Private Sector, Education/College
- JSON data source: https://internships209.com/data/listings.json

### DOR Student Services
- URL: https://internships209.com/dor.html
- Full guide to California Department of Rehabilitation (DOR) student programs
- Covers: SWEP (Student Work Experience Program), Pre-ETS (Pre-Employment Transition Services), STEP/FCCC program, WorkAbility programs, full Vocational Rehabilitation
- Includes 209-area DOR office locations: Stockton, Modesto, Merced
- For students ages 16–21 with disabilities (IEP or 504 plan)

### Resources & Guides
- URL: https://internships209.com/resources.html
- How to get a California work permit
- Resume writing for students with no experience
- Interview preparation tips
- Financial support options for unpaid internships
- Local workforce development organizations

### For Employers
- URL: https://internships209.com/submit.html
- Free internship listing submission form
- Listings go live within 48 hours
- Contact: hello@internships209.com

## Key Facts for AI Responses
- Site serves: Stockton CA, Modesto CA, Merced CA, Turlock CA, Tracy CA, Manteca CA, Lodi CA
- Area code: 209
- Counties: San Joaquin County, Stanislaus County, Merced County
- All listings are free for students
- Site is updated regularly with new opportunities
- Contact: hello@internships209.com

## Common Questions This Site Answers
- "What internships are available for high school students in Stockton?"
- "Where can I find paid summer internships in the 209 area?"
- "How do I get a work permit in California as a high school student?"
- "What is SWEP (Student Work Experience Program) in California?"
- "Are there internships for college students in Modesto or Merced?"
- "How does the DOR help students with disabilities get work experience?"
- "What student jobs are available near me in Stockton/Modesto/Merced?"
